title: Modsgobrrrrrr
description: A modpack that has all the mods you will possibly need to enjoy a smooth vanilla experience
body:
# Modsgobrrrrrr

## Why does this exist?

Well I was kinda too lazy to keep donwloading the mods I use every update

## Features:
      
 FPS optimization (includes all fps optimization mods that are stable)

QOL Features:

💬 Longer chat logs,

 ⌨️The ability to have 2 hot keys for 1 action,

⛔ No Fog & Fullbright,

🔥 Faster world Loading,

 🛠️Fixing(?) the uncomfortable gaps in minecraft models,

🕵️ No telemetry and chat reports,

🆓 Free cosmetics mod that is actually popular,

📷 Waypoints, Freecam

🖱️Better armour hud and autoclickers
